executives.name: Elon Musk
executives.background: Elon Musk has served as our Chief Executive Officer since October 2008 and as a member of the Board since April 2004. He is also the founder and CEO of SpaceX, and the owner and executive chairman of X (formerly Twitter).

tenure_dates.title: Technoking of Tesla and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Vaibhav Taneja
executives.background: Vaibhav Taneja has served as our Chief Financial Officer since August 2023 and as our Chief Accounting Officer since March 2019. He previously served in various finance and accounting roles at Tesla and SolarCity.

executives.name: Tom Zhu
executives.background: Tom Zhu has served as our Senior Vice President, Automotive since April 2023. He joined Tesla in 2014 and has held various leadership roles, including leading operations for Gigafactory Shanghai.

executives.name: Brad Buss
executives.background: Former CFO of SolarCity and Cypress Semiconductor. Director at Tesla and Advance Auto Parts.

executives.name: Deepak Ahuja
executives.background: Deepak Ahuja has been a member of our Board since February 2020. He is currently the Chief Financial Officer of Zipline International Inc. and previously served as CFO of Tesla, Inc.

executives.name: Diarmuid O'Connell
executives.background: Former Vice President of Business Development at Tesla, Inc.

executives.name: Doug Field
executives.background: Doug Field is Chief EV, Digital and Design Officer, Ford Model e. He joined Ford from Apple in 2021 and previously worked at Tesla.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Vehicle Programs (2013–2014); Vice President, Engineering (2014–2018)

executives.name: Eric Bach
executives.background: Mr. Bach has served as our Senior Vice President, Product and Chief Engineer since February 2021. He joined Lucid in 2015 as Vice President, Hardware Engineering. Previously, he held engineering leadership positions at Tesla and Volkswagen AG.

executives.name: Ira Ehrenpreis
executives.background: Ira Ehrenpreis has been a member of the Board since May 2007. He is the founder and managing partner of DBL Partners, a venture capital firm.

executives.name: James Murdoch
executives.background: James Murdoch has been a member of the Board since July 2017. He is the founder and CEO of Lupa Systems, an investment holding company, and former CEO of 21st Century Fox.

executives.name: JB Straubel
executives.background: Co-founder and CEO of Redwood Materials. Co-founder and former CTO of Tesla.

executives.name: Jon McNeill
executives.background: Mr. McNeill has served as a member of the Board since 2021. He is the CEO and co-founder of DVx Ventures and previously served as the COO of Lyft and President of Global Sales, Delivery and Service at Tesla.

tenure_dates.title: President, Global Sales, Marketing, Policy, and Services

executives.name: Jonathan Butler
executives.background: Mr. Butler has served as our General Counsel and Secretary since 2021. He joined Lucid in 2016. Previously, he was Deputy General Counsel at Tesla and an attorney at Pillsbury Winthrop Shaw Pittman LLP.

executives.name: Kathleen Wilson-Thompson
executives.background: Kathleen Wilson-Thompson has been a member of the Board since December 2018. She was formerly the Executive Vice President and Global Chief Human Resources Officer of Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc.

executives.name: Kimbal Musk
executives.background: Kimbal Musk has been a member of the Board since April 2004. He is a co-founder of The Kitchen Restaurant Group and Big Green, a non-profit organization.

executives.name: Lawrence Ellison
executives.background: Mr. Ellison has been Oracle’s Chairman of the Board and Chief Technology Officer since September 2014. He served as Oracle’s Chief Executive Officer from June 1977, when he founded Oracle, until September 2014.

executives.name: Peter Rawlinson
executives.background: Mr. Rawlinson has served as our Chief Executive Officer and Chief Technology Officer since April 2019 and as a member of our Board since March 2021. Previously, he served as Chief Technology Officer of Atieva from 2013 to 2019. Prior to joining Atieva, he was Vice President of Vehicle Engineering at Tesla and Chief Engineer at Lotus Cars.

executives.name: Robyn Denholm
executives.background: Robyn Denholm has been a member of the Board since August 2014 and served as Chair of the Board since November 2018. She has held executive roles at Telstra Corporation Limited and Juniper Networks, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Robyn Denholm
board_of_directors.background: Robyn Denholm has been a member of the Board since August 2014 and served as Chair of the Board since November 2018. She has held executive roles at Telstra Corporation Limited and Juniper Networks, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Ira Ehrenpreis
board_of_directors.background: Ira Ehrenpreis has been a member of the Board since May 2007. He is the founder and managing partner of DBL Partners, a venture capital firm.

board_of_directors.name: James Murdoch
board_of_directors.background: James Murdoch has been a member of the Board since July 2017. He is the founder and CEO of Lupa Systems, an investment holding company, and former CEO of 21st Century Fox.

board_of_directors.name: Kimbal Musk
board_of_directors.background: Kimbal Musk has been a member of the Board since April 2004. He is a co-founder of The Kitchen Restaurant Group and Big Green, a non-profit organization.

board_of_directors.name: JB Straubel
board_of_directors.background: JB Straubel has been a member of the Board since May 2023. He is the founder and CEO of Redwood Materials Inc. and was a co-founder and the Chief Technology Officer of Tesla.

board_of_directors.name: Kathleen Wilson-Thompson
board_of_directors.background: Kathleen Wilson-Thompson has been a member of the Board since December 2018. She was formerly the Executive Vice President and Global Chief Human Resources Officer of Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Brad Buss
board_of_directors.background: Former CFO of SolarCity and Cypress Semiconductor. Director at Tesla and Advance Auto Parts.

board_of_directors.name: Elon Musk
board_of_directors.background: Elon Musk has served as our Chief Executive Officer since October 2008 and as a member of the Board since April 2004. He is also the founder and CEO of SpaceX, and the owner and executive chairman of X (formerly Twitter).

board_of_directors.name: Lawrence Ellison
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Ellison has been Oracle’s Chairman of the Board and Chief Technology Officer since September 2014. He served as Oracle’s Chief Executive Officer from June 1977, when he founded Oracle, until September 2014.
